login.reset_password_desc:
Please enter the 6-digit verification code that sent to <0>{{email}}.
The code is valid for 30 minutes
login.forgot_password_desc: We'll email your instructions on how to reset it
login.otp_desc: If you haven't received the email, do the following:
login.otp_step_1: Make sure provided email address is correct
login.otp_step_4: Check the email client works normally

message.E0: Server Error. Please try again later
message.E3: Password must contain at least 8 characters, including 1 uppercase character, 1 lowercase character and 1 special character
message.E5: There are no {{tabName}} in the system
message.E6: There are no matched {{tabName}} in the system
message.E8: Old password and new password can not be same.
message.E11: Email or password is incorrect. Please try again
message.E12: New password cannot be the same as current password

dashboard.welcome_back: Welcome back! Here’s your latest health data — let’s see how you’ve been doing and where you can improve.
